title: peckia boissieri
intro: Peckia boissieri, also known as Boissier's peckia, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. Peckia boissieri is valued for its ability to promote digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
